notes.fact: The promotion gate passes only a bounded diagnostic-readiness status. It does not allow terminal utility, first_eval rerun, policy-scale comparison, or paper claims.
notes.agent_inference: The current ladder is complete through the requested wrong-goal, wasted-path, and map/pose diagnostic gate. The follow-up decision selected a nonterminal diagnostic report, which is now frozen in h001_rival_contradiction_region_contamination_multi_case_diagnostic_report_v1. A terminal utility contract still requires a separate label-free action rule without evaluation-only labels.
